content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the left ahead with the white boundary line visible on the right side — the car is on the right portion of the track heading into a left-curving section.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 83, target index = (83+5) % 121 = 88
- WP88: x=0.8921, y=4.1362
- Car: x=0.9476, y=4.3803, heading=179.784°
- dy = 4.1362 - 4.3803 = -0.2441
- dx = 0.8921 - 0.9476 = -0.0555
- bearing = atan2(-0.2441, -0.0555) → third quadrant: angle = atan(0.2441/0.0555) = 77.2°, bearing = -(180° - 77.2°) = **-102.8°**
- delta = -102.8° - 179.784° = -282.584° → normalize: -282.584 + 360 = **+77.4°** → LEFT

**Boundary check:**
- track_width/2 = 0.3799m, distance_from_center = 0.1315m, is_left_of_center = false (right of center)
- edge_distance (right) = 0.3799 - 0.1315 = **0.2484m** → above 0.20m threshold, safe
- delta = +77.4° → steer left (away from right edge) → no boundary concern

Delta ≈ +77°: |delta| > 50°, steer left: steering_angle=+25, speed=0.75.

```json
  "reasoning": "Track curves sharply south/southeast ahead (delta≈+77°), car is right of center but safe, requiring maximum left steering at reduced speed to follow the waypoint line.",

    "WP44-55: straight westward along y≈2.77.",
    "WP55-70: gentle southwest curve with moderate positive delta.",
    "WP82-90: sharp south/southeast curve — delta +50-80°, need max left steering (25°) at speed 0.75.",
    "WP83-88: heading near ±180°, waypoints curve south — large positive delta corrections needed.",
    "Car consistently right of center (0.13m) in WP82-83 region — edge_distance ~0.25m, safe.",
    "After WP90, track curves back north/northeast — expect delta to shift negative.",
    "Prefer speed 1.5 on straights; reduce to 0.75 when |delta|>50°."
  ],

  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP88 at (0.892, 4.136): bearing≈-102.8°, delta≈+77.4° → large left correction needed.",
  "speed": 0.75,
  "steering_angle": 25.0
}
```
